---
name: New Template Request
about: Suggest a workflow template that should be added to this library
title: "[Template Request] "
labels: template-request
assignees: ""
---

## What Automation Do You Need

Describe the maintainer problem this workflow would solve. One or two sentences is enough.

## Trigger

What GitHub event should start this workflow?

- [ ] Issue opened / labeled / commented
- [ ] Pull request opened / reviewed / merged
- [ ] Push to a branch
- [ ] Release published
- [ ] Schedule (cron)
- [ ] Manual (`workflow_dispatch`)
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Expected Behavior

What should the agent do step by step?

## Why This Is Not Already Covered

Which existing templates did you check, and why do they not fit your use case?

## Additional Context

Links, examples from other tools, or anything else that helps.
